revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Tokyo Imperial Palace |title = [[Tokyo Imperial Palace]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image =
|list1 = * [[Biota of Tokyo Imperial Palace|Biota]] * [[Chōwaden Reception Hall]] * [[Fukiage Palace]] * [[Kokyo Gaien National Garden]] * [[Sakurada Gate]] * [[Three Palace Sanctuaries]]
| below = * {{Icon|Category}} '''[[:Category:Tokyo Imperial Palace|Category]]''' * {{icon|Commons}} '''[[commons:Category:Tokyo Imperial Palace|Commons]]''' }}<noinclude> {{Navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan buildings and structures navigational boxes]] [[Category:Royal palaces navigational boxes]] [[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes|Imperial Palace]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
